title: Reconciliation
description: Process of matching processed output data with relevant input data to detect unexplained losses and establish the output as the master dataset for archiving and further use.

definitions.definition: Process of matching processed output data with relevant input data to detect unexplained losses and establish the output as the master dataset for archiving and further use.
